description: Product Description Brasso metal polish wadding keeps metal looking immaculate. For use on brass, copper, stainless steel and chrome, this product has been specially designed to provide excellent results and a longer lasting shine. These wadding pads Already have cleaning fluid within them, meaning there is no need to get an extra Cloth dirty. .
